headlines.title: President Trump arrives in China for high-stakes summit with Xi
headlines.description: President Trump was greeted in Beijing with a welcome ceremony ahead of his two-day summit with Chinese President Xi.

headlines.title: The Great Wall is being restored one brick at a time
headlines.description: BEIJING — Old Cheng was waiting patiently at the bottom of a steep mountain ridge as the minivans carrying our news team snaked their way through the Yan mountains to meet him.

headlines.title: Chinese EVs take the world by storm — except in the U.S.
headlines.description: China loves electric cars: making them, driving them and selling them to the rest of the world.

headlines.title: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?
headlines.description: How will Trump's China trip differ from his 2017 visit?

headlines.title: Trump arrives in China for Xi summit
headlines.description: Air Force One landed at Beijing Capital International Airport in China. Trump’s state visit includes a bilateral meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping. He is the first U.S. president to visit China since his last state visit in 2017 during his first term.

headlines.title: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China
headlines.description: Here's what's on Trump's to-do list in China

headlines.title: The war is on hold, but Iran’s internal crackdown is only deepening
headlines.description: While the Iranian regime has been battling its external enemies, Israel and the United States, it has also been ramping up a deadly crackdown on those seen as the enemy within.

headlines.title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
headlines.description: The South Carolina Supreme Court has overturned Alex Murdaugh's double murder conviction and ordered a new trial in the killings of his wife and son. NBC News' Laura Jarrett reports on the court's decision and what comes next for Murdaugh.

headlines.title: Drug counselor who distributed ketamine that killed Matthew Perry sentenced to 2 years
headlines.description: The man who pleaded guilty to distributing the ketamine that killed actor Matthew Perry was sentenced to 2 years in federal prison.

headlines.title: Supreme Court faces new criticism for redistricting decision so close to 2026 elections
headlines.description: The Supreme Court has admonished judges not to interfere in election cases when the process is underway, but it is being accused of doing that in redistricting decisions.

headlines.title: Nebraska secretary of state loses GOP primary to challenger questioning election security
headlines.description: Omaha businessman Scott Petersen on Tuesday defeated Nebraska Secretary of State Bob Evnen in a Republican primary election, toppling a two-term incumbent by raising questions on the campaign trail about election integrity and ballot security

headlines.title: Most U.S. doctors are quietly using this AI tool. Few patients know about it.
headlines.description: OpenEvidence, an AI-powered medical search tool, has become a fast friend to America’s doctors and is now used by nearly two-thirds of physicians.
